tasks.label: Test
tasks.command: npm run check; npm run build

tasks.label: Preview
tasks.command: npm run build; npm run preview

tasks.label: Preview 4321
tasks.command: npm run build; npm run preview -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4321

tasks.label: Share Public
tasks.command: npm run build; tailscale funnel reset; tailscale serve reset; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'serve\\build\\main\.js|node_modules\\serve|astro\\astro\.js" preview|npm-cli\.js" run preview' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Start-Process -FilePath npx.cmd -ArgumentList @('--yes','serve','dist','-l','4321'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; tailscale funnel --bg 4321; tailscale funnel status
